title: 阳光氢能开启电解槽"数智"蝶变 (Sungrow Hydrogen Launches Electrolyzer "Digital-Intelligence" Transformation)
authors_or_org: Sungrow Power Supply Co., Ltd. (阳光电源)
claim_supported: Sungrow's SMS1000 electrolyzer digital management system offers panoramic monitoring/safety control/5D health management; 20MW demo, 1000+ hours, TUV/DEKRA certified; no DC-distribution or isolation hardware described.
locator: Article body, product-description paragraphs, published 2024-12-26
notes: Tests F-15's own Sungrow-verticalization kill signal; finds monitoring/software layer only, not the DC-distribution/isolation/hot-swap hardware layer -- kill signal not yet triggered.

title: Outlook 2026: China's green hydrogen power play
claim_supported: China's central government included clean-hydrogen support in the 15th FYP (2026-30); Hydrogen Council CEO quoted describing China's iterative hydrogen-industry build approach.
locator: Article body
notes: Independent US energy-trade-press corroboration of CN 15th FYP hydrogen commitment.

india_origin_audit.notes: US energy trade publisher, HQ Houston, TX.

title: 十五五规划全文：大力发展绿色氢能 (15th Five-Year Plan full text: vigorously develop green hydrogen)

locator: Article body, published 2026-03-16
notes: Media reporting directly quoting the official plan text; corroborates the NDRC 2022 long-term plan (S09) is being carried into the current five-year cycle.

title: 中国石化新星新疆库车2万吨/年绿氢示范项目获评2024年度"新质生产力发展案例"

title: 近期八大电解水制氢设备招标汇总 (Recent major water-electrolysis hydrogen-equipment tender roundup)
authors_or_org: 新能源网 (New Energy Network / jgvogel.cn trade press)
claim_supported: China Energy Construction (中能建) tender, Shijiazhuang Luquan District, published 2025-03-07, bundles alkaline electrolyzer + power supply + storage/compressor equipment in ONE procurement lot (7,000 Nm3/h, 44.15MW PV); 7 of 8 other surveyed tenders procure stacks alone without bundled electrical cabinets.
locator: Article body, tender roundup table
notes: Shows CN market structure bundles DC power/distribution equipment with electrolyzer procurement under one EPC lot -- a headwind to F-15's independent-BOP-vendor thesis, not evidence of an open tender lane.

title: The Evolution of Laser Welding Safety Standards in Handheld Devices
authors_or_org: ADH Machine Tool (Anhui Donghai Machine Tool Co., Ltd.)
claim_supported: FDA Laser Notice transition: from 2025-01-01, all newly manufactured laser products entering the US market must be certified to the 2014 IEC 60825-1 standard (Notice 56 replacing Notice 50); ISO/DIS 11553-2 draft revision in circulation, finalized version anticipated 2025, first major overhaul in 15+ years of the 2007 edition.
locator: Article body, regulatory-timeline paragraphs
notes: CN-headquartered machine-tool maker's technical blog reporting on US/ISO regulatory developments; content independently corroborated by AWS source (S02) on the standards-tightening trend.

institutions.name: Anhui Donghai Machine Tool Co., Ltd. (ADH)

title: Setting the Standard for Handheld Laser Welding Technology
claim_supported: AWS D17 Committee has begun drafting handheld-laser-welding criteria into D17.1/D17.1M:2024 (Specification for Fusion Welding for Aerospace Applications); process expected to take 'several years'; AWS Safety and Health Fact Sheet No. 46 on Handheld Laser Welding Safety published.
locator: Article body, committee-activity paragraphs, published Dec 2024
notes: Second, independent, directly-fetched standards-body work-item substantiating F-17's gate condition (a); a different body/standard than ISO 11553-2.

india_origin_audit.notes: US standards/professional society, HQ Miami, FL.

title: Considerations about Handheld Laser Beam Welding (HLBW)
authors_or_org: International Institute of Welding (IIW) / European Welding Federation (EWF) / European Welding Association (EWA)
claim_supported: IIW/EWF/EWA brochure (published July 2025) presents voluntary best-practice recommendations for handheld laser beam welding safety, training, and qualification; explicitly states local regulations must be complied with; does not itself create a dated mandate.
locator: PDF retrieved successfully (HTTP 200, 4.7MB) but text content was image/binary-encoded and not machine-extractable this session; claim based on convergent WebSearch snippet summaries of the same document plus the file's confirmed existence/date/authorship.
notes: This is the P4-directed discovery lead (chase European welding-association handheld-laser safety materials); confirms the prior judge's characterization -- real, dated, voluntary guidance, not a dated enforcement/mandate trigger.

institutions.name: European Welding Federation / European Welding Association

india_origin_audit.notes: EU industry associations (EWF Porto/Portugal-affiliated secretariat; EWA Brussels).

title: 2025 Data Center Failures: What Outages Revealed About Resilience in the AI Era
claim_supported: Documents a chiller-plant-failure cooling incident at a CyrusOne-operated Chicago facility (CHI1) during Thanksgiving week 2025 that forced CME Group to halt trading over 10 hours; operator added backup cooling capacity afterward. Not confirmed as DLC-fluid-chemistry-specific (mechanical/chiller failure).
locator: Article body, incident-timeline paragraphs, published 2026-01-02
notes: Partially satisfies the P4-required operator-incident evidence; real, dated, named operator/incident, but not a DLC-coolant-chemistry mechanism specifically -- flagged honestly as a partial, not full, satisfaction.

claim_supported: Ecolab closed its ~$4.75B acquisition of CoolIT Systems on 2026-07-02; combining Nalco Water chemistry/digital monitoring with CoolIT's direct-liquid-cooling hardware into a '3D TRASAR cooling platform' with 'real-time visibility into system performance'; targeting $4B Global High-Tech annual sales by 2030 at 25% operating margin; CoolIT reported 100%+ YoY sales growth.
locator: Press release body, deal-terms and strategy paragraphs, dated 2026-07-02
notes: Major, dated, company-sourced finding that a Fortune-500 water-treatment incumbent has already built the combined chemistry+hardware+monitoring offering F-19 proposes -- materially earlier than the idea's own 'crowded by 2032' estimate.

india_origin_audit.notes: US public company (NYSE: ECL), HQ St. Paul, MN.
